mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo._PsData
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo._PsData (ROrderNo, CustomerNo, UserNo, ModelNo, Quantity, DlvDate, OptCode, MidSize, OrdDate, OROrderNo, ImpDate, CnNo, InvDate, Issuedate, CIQFlag, CIQDate, ProdFlag, mapper.update:
update dbo._PsData
ROrderNo = #{record.rorderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ModelNo = #{record.modelno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Quantity = #{record.quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER},
DlvDate = #{record.dlvdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
MidSize = #{record.midsize,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdDate = #{record.orddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
OROrderNo = #{record.ororderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ImpDate = #{record.impdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CnNo = #{record.cnno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvDate = #{record.invdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Issuedate = #{record.issuedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
CIQFlag = #{record.ciqflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CIQDate = #{record.ciqdate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
ProdFlag = #{record.prodflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvModDate = #{record.dlvmoddate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvCust = #{record.dlvcust,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
StateFlag = #{record.stateflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptFlag = #{record.optflag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SMCCode = #{record.smccode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InvoiceNo = #{record.invoiceno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
LocationNo = #{record.locationno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
QtyReceive = #{record.qtyreceive,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Operator = #{record.operator,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OptTime = #{record.opttime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Expdate_GC = #{record.expdateGc,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Remark_GC = #{record.remarkGc,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
EmpOrdProcess = #{record.empordprocess,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvModDate1 = #{record.dlvmoddate1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModDate2 = #{record.dlvmoddate2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModDate3 = #{record.dlvmoddate3,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Reason_Remark = #{record.reasonRemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DeptNo = #{record.deptno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SHIKOMINo = #{record.shikomino,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
OrdType = #{record.ordtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Produce_Factory = #{record.produceFactory,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Produce_Holon = #{record.produceHolon,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SalesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GreenCode = #{record.greencode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InDate_theory = #{record.indateTheory,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvOrd_Date = #{record.rcvordDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BeginProduce_date = #{record.beginproduceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InDate_InFact = #{record.indateInfact,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Exp_date = #{record.expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Export_Flag = #{record.exportFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Holon_Name = #{record.holonName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvModTime1 = #{record.dlvmodtime1,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModTime2 = #{record.dlvmodtime2,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
DlvModTime3 = #{record.dlvmodtime3,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
